version.name: 0.55-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.55-beta :
- Wwise：Functional Decoupling: Split Reload and Refresh logic; introduced support for CLI/Waapi mode switching；UX Improvements: Resolved stuttering issues during On/Off toggling and updated button icons to ASCII style.
- Region Flow：Performance Optimization: Enhanced overall system efficiency and responsiveness.
-- Mantrika Team -- 2026-04.17
